displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 4
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: The Bounty Hunter – Aurra Sing #1, Star Wars: Starfighter – Crossbones #1-3, Free Comic Book Day 2002 – Star Wars #1, Star Wars: Republic: #46-48, Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones #1-4, Star Wars: Hasbro/Toys’R’Us Exclusive #1-4, and material from Dark Horse Extra #44-47 and Star Wars Tales #2, 7, 14, 18, 20, & 24.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Menace Revealed Vol. 4
